title: DARK MODE OPTION WHEN SHARING A BOARD OUTSIDE OF MONDAY
excerpt:
Description
When i share a board which ibuilt in dark mode as it looks much better that way - i wan the person to open the view AUTOMATICALLY in dark mode - NOT have to adjust to dark mode which I know is available - but…

posts.author: NorthStarConsultants (Oliver Flood)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

When i share a board which ibuilt in dark mode as it looks much better that way - i wan the person to open the view AUTOMATICALLY in dark mode - NOT have to adjust to dark mode which I know is available - but not good when you have to send supporting steps to choose it whne they open it.
Summary keep the board in the DARK MODE i built it in

What are you trying to achieve

for the person that receives a shareable link to automatically open the board i built in dark mode to appear in dark mode - not for them to receive it in WHITE MODE.
